request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。
- 公司历史语料：AIA Group
- 历史固定标题参考（只复用译法语义，不强制大小写和换行）：財務及營運回顧 -> Financial and Operating Review
- 优先沿用该公司历史年报中已经稳定出现的栏目标题、导航名和管理层头衔译法。
- 若当前页面与历史年报中的页面形态接近，应优先参考该公司惯用的标题长度、表格标签写法和正式披露语气。
- 若历史英文标题采用全大写或特殊分行展示，仅借鉴其正式措辞，不强制沿用大小写和换行样式。
- 历史近似页面：
-   2022 p23 [section_lead] 財務及營運回顧
-   2023 p27 [section_lead] 財務及營運回顧
-   2024 p25 [section_lead] 財務及營運回顧

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 18,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b5",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "影響的情況下，我們錄得了稅後營運溢利、產生的基本自由盈餘",
      "current_translation": "resulting from the global pandemic, we recorded solid growth in operating profit after tax, free surplus",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.769,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 28,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        161.54,
        497.87,
        181.1
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b7",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "讓我們在眾多增長機遇下得以繼續投資。",
      "current_translation": "enabling us to continue investing in numerous growth opportunities.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.719,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 18,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        209.54,
        343.7,
        229.1
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b8",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "按固定匯率基準提供增長率及作出評述。",
      "current_translation": "Growth rates and commentary are provided on a constant exchange rate basis.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.641,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 18,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        236.75,
        202.68,
        246.04
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 7.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b9",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "概要及主要財務摘要",
      "current_translation": "Overview and Key Financial Summary",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.683,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 9,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        272.51,
        202.5,
        290.77
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 14.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b10",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "在2020年，友邦保險在全球大流行病帶來的空前商業和宏觀經濟狀況下錄得強勁的財務表現。儘管外出限制導致",
      "current_translation": "In 2020, AIA delivered strong financial performance amid an unprecedented business and macroeconomic environment brought about by the global pandemic. Despite mobility restrictions resulting in",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.701,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        310.21,
        527.23,
        322.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b11",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "2020年新業務價值下降，但隨著業務的調整和限制的有所放寬，我們看到了銷售勢頭的恢復。這種勢頭一直持續",
      "current_translation": "New business value declined in 2020, but as business adjustments were made and certain restrictions were eased, we saw a recovery in sales momentum. This momentum continued",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.733,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        326.21,
        527.23,
        338.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b12",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "到2021年，首兩個月新業務價值與2020年同期相比增長15%。多年來，我們審慎的財務管理和貫徹對高質素業務",
      "current_translation": "into 2021, with new business value in the first two months growing 15% compared to the same period in 2020. Over the years, our prudent financial management and consistent strategic focus on high-quality business",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.615,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        342.21,
        527.29,
        354.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b13",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "的策略性重點，體現了稅後營運溢利和產生的基本自由盈餘的持續增長、穩健而強韌的資本狀況以及每股股息的",
      "current_translation": "have been reflected in continued growth in operating profit after tax and underlying free surplus generated, a robust and resilient capital position, and further growth in dividend per share.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.721,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.69,
        358.21,
        527.15,
        370.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    }
  ]
}
